name: Dianthus Therapeutics, Inc. /DE/
summary: PART I . Overview We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company dedicated to developing potentially best-in-class therapies for patients living with severe autoimmune diseases. Our lead clinical-stage candidate, claseprubart, is a monoclonal antibody that is purposefully engineered with extended half-life, improved potency, and high selectivity for only the active C1s complement protein (C1s) enabling less frequent and more convenient self-administered subcutaneous (S.C.) injections suitable for...
